title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入伊拉克：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入伊拉克：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Iraq COSQC conformity inspection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in project specifications, Ministry of Electricity (MoE) grid-connection context, Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与伊拉克COSQC合格评定检验要求、项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、电力部（MoE）并网背景、伊拉克民防总局消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與伊拉克COSQC合格評定檢驗要求、項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、電力部（MoE）併網背景、伊拉克民防總局消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, COSQC conformity scope determination, Ministry of Electricity grid-connection approval, Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Iraq COSQC conformity inspection requirements, Ministry of Electricity grid-connection technical specifications, Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、COSQC合格评定范围裁定、电力部并网批准、伊拉克民防总局消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行伊拉克COSQC合格评定检验要求、电力部并网技术规格、伊拉克民防总局消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、COSQC合格評定範圍裁定、電力部併網批准、伊拉克民防總局消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行伊拉克COSQC合格評定檢驗要求、電力部併網技術規格、伊拉克民防總局消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Iraq's primary conformity gate for imported products is COSQC (Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control), which issues Iraqi Standards (IQS) and operates a pre-shipment conformity inspection regime. Iraq does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a full IEC 62619 mandatory certification scheme; however, COSQC conformity inspection and IEC-based standards are the practical gates for market entry. The Ministry of Electricity (MoE) governs grid connection and power project approvals. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Iraq are: (1) COSQC conformity inspection and certificate — the pre-shipment gate that requires products to align with applicable IQS or accepted IEC standards; (2) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline where project lenders or MoE specifications reference IEC standards; (3) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements referenced in utility and project-owner specifications, particularly for TotalEnergies, PowerChina, and Masdar solar-plus-storage projects; (4) Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate fire-safety installation approval for BESS facilities; (5) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions; and (6) grid voltage adaptation — Iraq operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz versus China's 220/380 V, requiring PCS re-parameterisation. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 are the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in COSQC inspection, project, or MoE review.
answer_first.zh: 伊拉克进口产品的主要合规门槛为COSQC（标准化和质量控制中央组织），该机构发布伊拉克标准（IQS）并运行装运前合格评定检验制度。伊拉克尚无与完整IEC 62619强制认证体系相当的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，COSQC合格评定检验和基于IEC的标准是市场准入的实际门槛。电力部（MoE）负责并网及电力项目审批。中国BESS出口伊拉克的实际差距包括：（1）COSQC合格评定检验及证书——装运前门槛，要求产品符合适用IQS或认可的IEC标准；（2）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，当项目贷款方或MoE规格引用IEC标准时，这是国际预期基准；（3）公用事业和项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求，特别针对道达尔能源、PowerChina和Masdar光储一体化项目；（4）BESS设施的伊拉克民防总局消防安全安装审批；（5）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（6）电网电压适配——伊拉克电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，与中国220/380 V不同，需重新配置PCS参数。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在COSQC检验、项目或MoE审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 伊拉克進口產品的主要合規門檻為COSQC（標準化和質量控制中央組織），該機構發布伊拉克標準（IQS）並運行裝運前合格評定檢驗制度。伊拉克尚無與完整IEC 62619強制認證體系相當的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，COSQC合格評定檢驗和基於IEC的標準是市場准入的實際門檻。電力部（MoE）負責併網及電力項目審批。中國BESS出口伊拉克的實際差距包括：（1）COSQC合格評定檢驗及證書——裝運前門檻，要求產品符合適用IQS或認可的IEC標準；（2）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，當項目貸款方或MoE規格引用IEC標準時，這是國際預期基準；（3）公用事業和項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求，特別針對道達爾能源、PowerChina和Masdar光儲一體化項目；（4）BESS設施的伊拉克民防總局消防安全安裝審批；（5）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（6）電網電壓適配——伊拉克電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，與中國220/380 V不同，需重新配置PCS參數。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在COSQC檢驗、項目或MoE審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
